Package dk.mada.jaxrs.naming

Class NamingOpts

java.lang.Object
dk.mada.jaxrs.naming.NamingOpts
public class NamingOpts extends Object
Definitions of naming options. These can be overridden via options provided by the user.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    NamingOpts.SchemaOrder
    Ordering preference when renaming due to name conflicts.
